prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical portrait of a young East Asian woman sitting against a completely black background, lit by a narrow dramatic beam of warm light from the upper left. She has short chestnut-brown bob hair with wispy bangs, smooth natural makeup, large dark eyes, and a subtle shy smile. Pose her facing the camera in a close half-body composition, with one hand raised gently to her lips as if in a quiet, thoughtful moment. She wears a sleeveless white satin cheongsam-inspired top with a high Mandarin collar, floral jacquard texture, frog-button closures, and a keyhole neckline. Emphasize chiaroscuro lighting: strong highlights on her face, hair, shoulder, hand, and glossy fabric, with the rest of the body fading into deep shadow. Use realistic skin texture, soft specular highlights, shallow depth of field, intimate studio photography mood, high contrast, elegant cinematic atmosphere, vertical 2:3 framing, no text, no watermark, no extra objects.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic vertical portrait of a young East Asian woman sitting against a completely black background, lit by a narrow dramatic beam of warm light from the upper left. She has short chestnut-brown bob hair with wispy bangs, smooth natural makeup, large dark eyes, and a subtle shy smile. Pose her facing the camera in a close half-body composition, with one hand raised gently to her lips as if in a quiet, thoughtful moment. She wears a sleeveless white satin cheongsam-inspired top with a high Mandarin collar, floral jacquard texture, frog-button closures, and a keyhole neckline. Emphasize chiaroscuro lighting: strong highlights on her face, hair, shoulder, hand, and glossy fabric, with the rest of the body fading into deep shadow. Use realistic skin texture, soft specular highlights, shallow depth of field, intimate studio photography mood, high contrast, elegant cinematic atmosphere, vertical 2:3 framing, no text, no watermark, no extra objects.
promptZh: 创作一张写实风格的竖构图摄影棚人像，主角为一名 20 多岁的东亚女性，居中置于全黑背景前，呈现出戏剧性的光影主题。她留着深棕色短波波头，配有薄刘海，妆容自然，皮肤质感柔和光泽，神情平静，带着一丝神秘的浅笑直视镜头。姿势设定为一只手轻轻抬起至唇边，手指微蜷，营造出亲密而优雅的氛围。她身着无袖白色缎面旗袍风格上衣，带有精致的提花纹理、高立领、盘扣以及水滴形领口。使用从左上方/前方射入的单束窄光，照亮她的面部、发丝高光、手部、肩部以及闪烁的布料，其余身体和背景则隐没在深邃的黑色阴影中。强调高对比度的明暗对照法照明、真实的皮肤纹理、眼神光、光泽布料反射、浅景深、电影感低调摄影、85mm 人像镜头效果、2:3 竖构图，无文字，无水印。可通过以下参数自定义：20 多岁的东亚女性，深棕色短波波头配薄刘海，白色缎面旗袍风格无袖上衣，深黑阴影中的戏剧性窄聚光灯，以及 平静神秘的浅笑。
